body_txt: In addition to teaching their subject matter, this teacher or professor solves all of their students' problems. Whether it's ordinary teen angst from a failed romance, addiction, bullying, a quarrel with friends, or dealing with divorcing parents, no problem is too small or too large to be handled by this benevolent, empathetic schoolteacher... even if they have no psychologist training . A type of Cool Teacher . Often the protagonist of a Save Our Students plot. Compare with The Shrink and Stern Teacher (the latter being another reasonable teacher archetype, although this can overlap if their students crossed the moral lines). Definitely contrast Sadist Teacher and Psycho Psychologist . Not to be confused with a Psychology teacher .
